## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem (e.g. YouTube page + addon buttons or console).

## Environment
- Firefox version: [e.g. 126]
- Addon version: (from about:debugging or popup)
- YouTube page (home / watch / search / subscriptions): 
- OS: 

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here. Console logs (with debug toggle on) are very helpful.
